1 - Introduction to Sales Training.mp4 Hey everybody, my name is Jeremy. This is going to be a sales training delivered by myself. Listen, I'm a marketer. I give you all this perspective inside of this training because simply put, I want to help you make more money. I've done outbound sales now for the last eight years in a row. We've done no inbound sales within my marketing agency. And I noticed that a lot of salespeople currently, especially in this internet-based business era, dealing with leads who have scheduled calls with them and they've really lost a lot of sales skills because of that. So I give you a bunch of perspective inside of this training. I do come off a little aggressive at times. I don't do so to be disrespectful towards anybody. I do so to really emphasize my views passionately. So I hope you enjoy all the trainings. If you have any questions at any time or if you ever need me, you're probably a client if you're watching this or a staff member of one of my clients. You can always reach out to me. You likely have my email. If not, it's CEO at Jeremy . expert. You can also look up me on Instagram. It's at Jeremy, just my name, J-E-R-E-M-Y. And I'm always here to help. Hope you enjoyed the training. And don't take anything I say the wrong way.
